_comment: Public Creative Workshops page copy. Page shell: creative-workshops.html (when published). Review pricing and funding language with leadership before publishing.

meta.title: Creative Workshops | Who's to Say ? Foundation
meta.description: Public-facing creative workshops and individualized creative media sessions in our creative studio — skill-building through digital storytelling and community participation.

hero.title: Creative Workshops
hero.subtitle: Individualized creative media sessions and small-group workshops in a supportive creative studio — built around interests, not a one-size-fits-all schedule.

workshops.title: Intro to Video Editing
workshops.summary: Import, trim, and share short clips using accessible tools.

workshops.title: Podcast & Audio Basics
workshops.summary: Microphone setup, recording, and simple editing for voice projects.

workshops.title: Photography & Visual Storytelling
workshops.summary: Compose, capture, and curate images for a personal portfolio.

workshops.title: Canva & Digital Design
workshops.summary: Graphics, stickers, and social visuals with readable layouts.

workshops.title: On-Camera Confidence
workshops.summary: Short segments, intros, and teleprompter practice.

workshops.title: Music & Playlist Projects
workshops.summary: Build and present playlists with introductions between tracks.

workshops.title: Sports Media Crew
workshops.summary: Film highlights, fan takes, and simple game recaps.

workshops.title: Maker & Art Studio Sessions
workshops.summary: Create prints, crafts, or digital art for showcases.

workshops.title: Community Story Projects
workshops.summary: Tell your story through video, writing, or art — your way.

workshops.title: Independent Living Skills Labs
workshops.summary: Practical routines: schedules, shopping practice, and navigation.

pricing.title: Session Options
pricing.intro: Pricing reflects session length, format, and materials. Contact us to match the right option to each participant's goals.

tiers.name: Intro Session
tiers.description: A single creative studio visit or short skill-building session to explore fit and interests.

tiers.name: Workshop Block
tiers.description: A focused multi-visit block for a defined project — digital storytelling, design, or studio production.

tiers.name: Extended Project
tiers.description: A longer individualized creative media session series with portfolio or showcase goals.

tiers.name: Community Studio Events
tiers.description: Intergenerational and community participation events as our studio capacity grows.

steps.title: Connect
steps.body: Reach out with interests, goals, and the best way to reach you.

steps.title: Match
steps.body: We suggest a workshop or individualized session format that fits.

steps.title: Create
steps.body: Sessions happen in our creative studio or community settings — project-based and interest-led.

steps.title: Share
steps.body: Participants build skills and optional portfolio pieces they can share with family and supporters.

inclusiveSection.title: Inclusive & Intergenerational
inclusiveSection.body: Our public-facing classes welcome participants of different ages and abilities. Sessions emphasize dignity, creativity, and community participation — never a transactional or clinical feel.

fundingNote.title: Funding & Support Coordinators
fundingNote.body: Some participants may be eligible for funding when approved through the individual's plan or funding source. Approval decisions are made by the applicable funding source, plan, or reviewer.

makerSpace.title: Help Build the Studio
makerSpace.body: We are building toward a dedicated maker space — raising funds for equipment, accessibility, and a future community studio. This is a next-phase vision, not a current licensed facility.

finalCta.title: Ready to explore a workshop?
finalCta.body: Tell us what excites you — we'll help find the right creative path.
